'''Drixo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gangster and a rival of [[Progga]] the Hutt.

==Biography==
Drixo was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]].<ref name="Drixo">{{CSWECite|I|224|Drixo the Hutt}}</ref> In [[67 BBY/Legends|67 BBY]], some of Progga and Drixo's kin were at [[High Port Space Center]], on the [[Muun/Legends|Muun]]<ref name="Plagueis">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref> colony<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], where visitors saw them amongst envoys from [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]], [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]] and [[Yaga (species)|Yagai]]. That same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Drixo and Progga made investments with the Muun [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Hego Damask]] of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] on<ref name="Plagueis" /> the planet<ref name="OF" /> [[Comra/Legends|Comra]]. Their deal enabled Damask to offer [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]] an investment in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which enabled her to fund a [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] that could exceed the ones on Muunilinst and [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].<ref name="Plagueis" />

Drixo became a rival to Progga during the years after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].<ref name="Drixo" /> In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> she hired [[Dubrak Qennto]] and his crew to transport furs—and to smuggle [[firegem]]s hidden within them—to Comra, but Qennto's [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Bargain Hunter]]'' was intercepted by Progga and, eventually, [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]], which caused a delay of the shipment for more than three [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]].<ref name="OF" />

Prior to her [[Death/Legends|death]], Drixo was the owner of [[Bilbringi Depot]] on [[Bilbringi VII]].<ref name="SM3" />
